rss.title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
rss.snippet: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

rss.title: Trump removes US Attorney General Pam Bondi
rss.snippet: Bondi's time as top US law enforcement officer was overshadowed by her handling of the Epstein files.

rss.title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
rss.snippet: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.
